creator: gahr@gahr.ch
text:
The following patch:

- updates ayam from 1.10 to 1.13
- updates tk dependency from 8.2 to 8.4
- removes useless dependency on tcl (tk itself is dependent on tcl)
- updates aqsis dependency from 0 to 1
- cleans the build (almost all warnings have been removed)
- sets maintainship to me
